name: claude-statusline
description: A package-manager-style theme manager for the Claude Code status line — browse, preview, build, and switch pixel-art galleries and color palettes with one command.

plugins.name: csl
plugins.description: Theme your Claude Code status line like packages: list / search / preview / set / build. Two-tier built-in (nord/minimal/blank) + user themes; activation rewrites settings.json (single source of truth).
